name: Grasshopper Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat and stir 1/2 cup sugar, gelatin, and water in the top of a double boiler over simmering water until the gelatin dissolves.
2. Lightly beat egg yolks, blend in a little hot mixture, return to pan, and cook, stirring, for 3-5 minutes until thick and no raw egg taste remains.
3. Turn off heat, mix in liqueurs, and place a circle of wax paper flat on the surface. Cool until the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon.
4. Whip cream to soft peaks; fold into sauce.
5. Tint mint green with 3 drops green food coloring and 1 drop blue.
6. Beat egg whites until foamy, gradually beat in remaining sugar until soft peaks form. Fold into sauce.
7. Spoon into pie shell, freeze until firm.
8. Garnish with chocolate shavings or curls.
